status: Cycle 2 Harden Week COMPLETE — wrapped one day early on Day 76 (cycleDay 24). Day 4 entered with empty Open Bugs queue, so the day pivoted to closing the two verification-only learnings from Day 75 + a regression sweep. Shipped: (1) `GameState.seedProgress(count=18, opts={stars,pureLogic,hardcore,clear})` helper in js/main.js — synthetically marks levels 1..count completed with `_seeded:true` tombstone marker; non-destructive monotonic (re-seeding at lower stars never downgrades); defaults to 3★ + optimal gates + 30s; auto-re-renders level-select + tier gating + progress bar. Returns {seeded,requested,max,stars,pureLogic,hardcore} summary. Closes Day 75 learning that future Harden harnesses needed to fast-forward to tier3 (Tournament/Random/Adaptive/Infinite/Customize/Mastery Tree/...) without 18 manual solves. (2) `runSimulation()` re-entry contract codified in a 7-line doc comment above the existing `isAnimating` guard — documents that the guard blocks concurrent (in-flight) re-entry but NOT sequential re-entry, and that RUN-spam is therefore idempotent at the simulation layer; any future feature wanting rate-limiting must add its own guard. Day 75's wording understated this. CDP verification (12 assertions on localhost:8901 via raw WebSocket): build identity 11 ?v=1779465600 refs unified, seedProgress exists on window.game, cold-start hides all 16 tier-gated buttons, seedProgress(18) reveals 13 tier3+ buttons, progress shape correct (18 entries all _seeded:true), Tournament screen opens with 3 tabs (display:flex), non-destructive at lower stars (L1 stays 3★ after re-seed at stars=1), {clear:true} wipes cleanly, Level 1 core loop unaffected, RUN-spam 10/10 ok with guard holding, 0 console errors. Cache bust ?v=1779465600, sw.js CACHE_NAME signal-circuit-v52. Wrote reviews/harden-cycle-2-week-summary.md — closes Cycle 2 Harden Week 5 days condensed into 4 (Day 73 audit → Day 74 playthrough + 1 P2 fix → Day 75 25-case stress sweep → Day 76 close learnings + regression). Final: 1 bug found, 1 fixed, 0 open at week end, 0 console errors across the week.
_priorStatus: Cycle 2 Harden Week Day 3 complete (cycleDay 23). Edge Cases & Stress sweep on live build (?v=1779379200, sw v51). 25 stress/edge tests, 25 pass, 0 console errors, 0 new bugs. Tested: T1 rapid gate placement during simulation (14 gates inserted mid-anim), T2 wire drawing during animation (no-throw), T3 10× resize stress (canvas 820×834 stable), T4 tab reachability on gameplay (15 focusables: back / shortcuts / encyclopedia / kb-wiring / panel-toggle / next-level / …), T5 colorblind+light/dark class toggle, T6 perf with 25 gates + 20 wires (1.39ms avg frame, 13.9ms 10× render), T7 localStorage capacity (50×50KB writes no-OOM), T8 mode-switch storm (level-select ↔ daily/challenge/sandbox/tournament/infinite always returns clean), T9 Blitz+Speedrun HUD cleanup (Day 61+74 regression — both `display:none`, mode flags false, timers cleared), T10 RUN spam (10 calls, 0 errors), T11 Quick Test spam (10 calls, 0 errors), T12 hint button cap (≤3), T13 Lab Bench entry L36 (`isLabBench=true`, `#lab-hud` flex, RUN '📐 Submit Blueprint', `_lab={attempts:0,max:3,exhausted:false}`), T14 Tournament screen open+close (3 tabs, 10 leaderboard rows, post-close `display:none`), T15 Mythic celebration overlay lazy-mount via `ui.showMythicCelebration()` (creates `#mythic-celebration` then `display:flex`), T16 `#open-settings-btn` opens settings-modal with 14 buttons + 📲 Install App (`#install-app-btn`), T17 SW controller activated (scriptURL=/sw.js, state=activated), T18 blur/focus + visibilitychange cycle no-throw, T19 UI thrash 15× enter/exit gameplay (final screen level-select), T20 undo/redo stress 15+15 ops no-throw, T21 achievements modal sort mythic-first (54 rows, top-5 all `tier-mythic`), T22 build identity (11 `?v=1779379200` refs unified, sw CACHE_NAME `signal-circuit-v51`), T23 cold-start localStorage clear (13 `signal*` keys removed clean), T24 SW cache asset count (`signal-circuit-v51` precache = 27 assets), T25 light-mode+colorblind paint stability on gameplay (body `rgb(245,243,235)`, canvas transparent). Findings: 0 new bugs, but flagged 2 verification-only learnings — (a) tier3-gated UI (Tournament/Random Challenge sliders) needs a `seedProgress()` dev helper so Harden harnesses can reach those screens without 18 manual completions, and (b) `runSimulation()` does not block re-entry by default (every click starts a fresh sim; today's path is idempotent + race-safe but a future feature could quietly depend on the inverse — documented in LESSONS_LEARNED). BUGS.md `Open Bugs` section remains empty.

Cycle 2 Build Week COMPLETE — Day 5: Weekly Tournament Mode + Cycle Polish shipped. New WeeklyTournament class (~250 LOC) wraps generateWeeklyPuzzle with seeded ISO-week archive (`YYYY-Www`), pseudo-leaderboard (50 deterministic scores + Gaussian-ish gate/time distribution + uniqueness probe), single-shot scoring (`score = gates*100 + max(0, timeSec - 60)`, lower wins), 8-week archive (deterministic past-week reproduction by stubbing Date inside buildPuzzle), my-best persistence, lifetime stats (totalAttempts/podiums/wins). New tournament-screen with 3 tabs (This Week / My Best / Archive) gated tier3 (18+ levels). Tier3 also hides weekly-puzzle-btn (Tournament subsumes it). 2 new gold achievements: tournament_podium (top-3 in any week) + tournament_crowned (1st in any week). Completion intercept added in BOTH runSimulation and runQuickTest BEFORE infinite/challenge branches: when currentLevel.isTournament, route through weeklyTournament.submitScore(gates, elapsed, displayName) which returns {rank, percentile, isNewBest, score, podium, crowned, achievements} and persists best-of-week. Archive replay flagged via isTournamentArchive=true to suppress score submission. Tournament screen uses tab-based pane switching (.tournament-tab + .tournament-tab-pane) with fade-in animation. Polish: cache-bust audit (11 ?v= refs all aligned to ?v=1779292800), single CSS pass (~200 lines new tournament styles + light-mode mirrors). Cache bust ?v=1779292800, sw.js v50. CDP smoke verification (23/24 assertions, 1 expected miss in test harness only): WeeklyTournament class exists, instance attached, tournament-btn DOM exists, tournament-screen DOM exists, tournament_podium + tournament_crowned achievements defined as gold; tier gating cold/tier2/tier3 transitions; tournament-screen opens, week label populated, puzzle title populated, leaderboard renders 10 rows, archive 8 weeks, my-best empty state; submitScore(3, 25, 'TestPlayer') returns rank=1 percentile=96 score=300 podium=true crowned=true achievements=[tournament_podium, tournament_crowned]; localStorage tournament data persists; getLeaderboard()=50 entries, getCombinedBoard()=51 (with player); 0 console errors throughout.

Cycle 2 Build Week Day 4 — Rare/Epic Achievement Tier (Mythic + Diamond) shipped. Added 5 mythic + 3 diamond achievements layered onto existing tier metadata: 'mythic_galaxy_brain' (3-star every campaign + every mastery), 'mythic_eclipse_run' (30-day daily streak), 'mythic_architect' (10 sub-circuits), 'mythic_lightning' (Infinite 100-streak), 'mythic_logicians_path' (pure logic on every campaign level), 'diamond_hardcore_marathon' (20 hardcore levels), 'diamond_master_builder' (1000 lifetime gates), 'diamond_community_champion' (10 distinct community levels). New TIER_ORDER (mythic→diamond→gold→silver→bronze) + TIER_LABELS exports from achievements.js. AchievementManager extensions: _checkRareAchievements(gs) + public alias checkRareAchievements, checkMasterBuilder(total), checkLightning(streak), checkEclipseRun(), checkArchitect(), getTierCounts(), getProgress(id, gs), isMythic(id). Hooks: trackGatePlaced → Master Builder; InfiniteRunManager.onSolve → Lightning at 100; trackDailyChallengeComplete → Eclipse Run; checkAll → Architect at 10 sub-circuits; checkAfterCompletion + community-completion paths → _checkRareAchievements (Galaxy Brain, Logician's Path, Hardcore Marathon, Community Champion). Bonus latent-bug fix: AchievementManager.checkAll now routes through showAchievementToasts(newlyUnlocked) instead of the non-existent showAchievementToast(ach) singular call (Day 53 latent bug surfaced once Architect mythic landed on the same path). New mythic-only Cosmetic wire palette ('mythic') gated by { type: 'anyMythic' } condition reading gs.achievements.unlocked. New iridescent celebration overlay #mythic-celebration (z 3000) with letter-by-letter engraving (per-character spans + staggered animationDelay), 3.6s auto-dismiss + click-anywhere; toast queue spacing bumped 3200→4200ms when a mythic precedes the toast. renderAchievements: tier-sorted modal (mythic-first), tier-class rows (tier-mythic w/ animated prismatic gradient border, tier-diamond w/ icy glow), inline progress bar .achievement-progress for locked diamond/mythic chase items showing current/goal. Logic Profile: new .profile-tier-counts row with 5 tier chips (🥉🥈🥇💎🌌). Cache bust ?v=1779206400, sw v49. CDP verification (39 assertions across 15 test groups + 8-step gameplay smoke): tier metadata + 8 new achievement ids; modal mythic-first ordering; ALL goal values; Master Builder via 1000-gate trackGatePlaced; Architect via checkAll seeded subCircuitsCreated=10; Eclipse Run via 29→30 streak transition; Galaxy Brain + Logician's Path via seeded 3-star + pureLogic + mastery; Mythic palette anyMythic condition; Hardcore Marathon at 20 seeded hardcoreCompleted; Community Champion at 10 distinct ids; mythic celebration overlay exists/displays/has-letters/auto-dismisses; light-mode mythic celebration palette; tier-counts chip with mythic count; cache bust v=1779206400 + sw v49; 0 console errors; Level 1 cold-start gameplay smoke (gates place, runSimulation no-throw on incomplete circuit, achievements modal opens via button click, mythic-first header). 0 console errors across all paths.

Cycle 2 Build Week Day 3 — Discovery Lab Redesign: Blueprint Mode shipped. Chapter 8 rebranded 'Discovery Lab' → 'Lab Bench' with new narrative ('Design first. Submit once.'). Levels 36–40 now `isLabBench:true` (layered alongside `isDiscovery:true`). RUN button replaced by '📐 Submit Blueprint'; Quick Test hidden in lab mode. New #lab-hud strip shows draft state, gate budget chip ('≈ N gates · target M'), and tries counter (X/3 submissions). After 3 failed submits the run-btn locks and a '🔬 Reset Lab' button surfaces — click restores 3 fresh tries but locks the first-try achievement chase. State machine on `gameState._lab = {attempts, maxAttempts:3, exhausted, firstTryLocked, cleared}`; intercept consumes one attempt at the top of BOTH `runSimulation` and `runQuickTest` before isAnimating flips. First-entry tutorial overlay (gated by `signal-circuit-lab-tutorial-seen` localStorage flag) explains 'design first, test once'. New chapter-9 celebration branch in `_getCelebrationConfig`: cyan/white blueprint hologram particles with 📐🔬📊✂️🖋️ emoji burst (distinct shadow-blurred render). Two new gold achievements: `drafted_right` (3 first-try solves across distinct lab levels) + `lab_method` (5 lab levels cleared). Stats: `blueprintsSubmitted`, `blueprintsFirstTrySolved`, `blueprintLevelsCleared` + Set-mirror arrays for distinct-level tracking. Cache bust ?v=1779120000, sw v48. CDP verification (10 checks): cold-start lab UI (HUD visible, run-btn relabeled, QT hidden, tutorial fires); 3 fails → exhausted state + run-btn disabled + Reset visible; Reset zeros attempts and locks firstTry; first-try L36/L37/L38 → drafted_right unlocks; 5 lab clears → lab_method unlocks; Level 1 smoke (HUD hidden, RUN restored, QT visible); revisit suppresses tutorial; light-mode lab HUD palette applies. 0 console errors across all paths.
lastRunNote: Cycle 2 Harden Week Day 4 complete (cycleDay 24, Day 76) — wrapped Harden Week one day early. Open Bugs queue was empty entering the day, so closed both Day 75 verification-only learnings. Shipped `GameState.seedProgress()` dev helper (+58 LOC) and codified `runSimulation()` re-entry contract (+8 LOC doc comment). 12-assertion CDP verification, 0 console errors. Cache bust ?v=1779465600, sw v52. Wrote reviews/harden-cycle-2-week-summary.md and specs/day-76-seed-progress-helper.md. Cycle 2 Harden Week final tally: 1 P2 found+fixed (Day 74 Speedrun HUD), 0 open bugs at week end, 1 dev surface improvement (seedProgress), 1 engine contract documented (runSimulation re-entry), 0 console errors across all 4 days.
_priorRunNoteDay75: Cycle 2 Harden Week Day 3 complete (cycleDay 23). Edge Cases & Stress on live build (?v=1779379200, sw v51). 25-case stress sweep, 25/25 pass, 0 new bugs, 0 console errors. Build identity verified: 11 `?v=1779379200` cache-bust refs unified, SW CACHE_NAME `signal-circuit-v51` precaches 27 assets. Day 61 + Day 74 HUD cleanup regression both held (Blitz and Speedrun HUDs return to `display:none` with mode flags false and timers cleared after Back). Lab Bench entry on L36 verified end-to-end (`isLabBench=true`, RUN labeled '📐 Submit Blueprint', `_lab={attempts:0,max:3,exhausted:false}`). Tournament screen opens with 3 tabs + 10 leaderboard rows and closes cleanly. Mythic celebration overlay correctly lazy-mounts via `ui.showMythicCelebration()` (DOM does not exist at cold start — verified by direct factory invocation). Achievements modal renders mythic-first (54 rows, top 5 all `tier-mythic`). Performance with 25 gates + 20 wires: **1.39ms avg frame** (13.9ms for 10× render). localStorage capacity confirmed for 50×50KB writes. UI thrash (15× enter/exit gameplay), undo/redo stress (15+15 ops), RUN spam (10 calls), Quick Test spam (10 calls), 10× resize event flood, blur/focus + visibilitychange cycle, mode-switch storm across all challenge modes — all clean. Cold-start localStorage clear removes 13 `signal*` keys without residue. Two verification-only learnings logged in LESSONS_LEARNED: (1) tier3-gated UI (Tournament/Random) needs a future `seedProgress()` dev helper to keep Harden coverage high without 18 manual completions, (2) `runSimulation()` re-entry is non-blocking by default — today idempotent + race-safe, but documented for future features.
_priorRunNote: Cycle 2 Harden Week Day 2 complete (cycleDay 22). Level Playthrough on live build (?v=1779292800, sw v50). Programmatically validated truth tables for sampled levels 1/5/10/15/20/25/30/35/40: all combos present, AND/NOR/OR/Majority/2-to-1 MUX/2-bit Adder/1-to-4 Demux semantics verified. Hands-on solves with completion celebration: L1 AND (1 gate), L5 NOR (NOT(OR), 2 gates), L10 OR-from-AND+NOT (De Morgan 4 gates). Found 1 P2 bug: Speedrun HUD persists on level-select after Back. Fixed in `showLevelSelect()` with symmetric defensive cleanup block. Cache bust ?v=1779379200, sw v51. 0 console errors across all paths.

nextCycle.focus: Prune Week Day 1 — Fresh Eyes Audit. With the new `seedProgress()` helper, the fresh-eyes audit can pivot between cold-start clutter and mid-game clutter (seed 6 / 12 / 18 / 40) on demand. Write PRUNE_REPORT.md scoring clutter 1-10, listing redundant features, wordy text, and proposed cuts in 3 tiers. Cycle 1 Prune closed at clutterScore=8; targeting 5 or below this cycle.

phase3Focus: Fix replayability, deepen engagement, smooth difficulty curve

CDP verification (6 test groups): cold-start UI, welcome arc + L3 modal, snooze respect, force-from-settings, standalone suppression, iOS UA fallback, streak chip after first solve, gameplay smoke — all pass with 0 console errors
`GameState.seedProgress(count=18, opts={stars,pureLogic,hardcore,clear})` dev/Harden helper in js/main.js — +58 LOC
Helper writes `_seeded:true` tombstone marker on every synthetic entry; real `completeLevel()` never writes that key (forensics free)
Non-destructive monotonic: re-seeding at lower stars never downgrades existing real solves (T8 verified: L1 stays 3★ after seedProgress(5,{stars:1}))
Defaults: stars=3, bestGateCount=level.optimalGates, bestTime=30, attempts=1; clamps `stars` to 1–3
`{clear:true}` opt-in wipes all entries before seeding (resetProgress under the hood)
Auto-re-renders level-select + applyProgressGating() + updateProgressBar() so tier-gated buttons appear immediately after seed
Returns `{seeded, requested, max, stars, pureLogic, hardcore}` summary for harness assertions
`runSimulation()` re-entry contract codified in 7-line doc comment above existing `isAnimating` guard — +8 LOC
Contract: in-flight calls are no-ops; after finally clears the flag, next call starts a fresh sim; no debounce beyond 'one in flight at a time'; rate-limiting features must add their own guard
Day 75's wording understated this — the guard DOES block re-entry, just only the concurrent kind, not the sequential kind
